name: Pasta Pizza
recipeIngredient: 3 cups elbow macaroni, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Prepare a 12-inch pizza pan with cooking spray; set aside.
3. To prepare crust, combine hot macaroni, egg whites, and parmesan cheese.
4. Spread the macaroni mixture over the prepared pan.
5. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add mushrooms, onions, bell peppers, and garlic until all is tender.
6. Stir in crushed tomatoes, tomato paste, sugar, oregano, basil, salt, and black pepper.
7. Top with additional sliced mushrooms and sprinkle with grated mozzarella and cheddar cheeses.
8. Bake for 25 minutes or until heated through.
